mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales indicates firm consumer demand and near-term revenue momentum for index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with positive 3-month RSAFS growth do not deliver higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than periods with nonpositive growth in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate above an elevated level signals weakening household income, tighter credit quality, and lower earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 8.0% and rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward instances or if triggered mean returns are not below untriggered returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate pinned near zero lowers discount rates and encourages duration risk-taking, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when inflation pressure is not accelerating.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.25% while 3-month CPIAUCSL growth does not accelerate versus the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the FEDFUNDS-below-0.25% and nonaccelerating-CPI condition is followed by nonpositive 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of triggered walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: Joint increases in industrial production and payroll employment identify synchronized real-economy expansion that improves operating leverage and earnings breadth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is positive and PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive INDPRO and PAYEMS signal has a 60-day hit rate below 50% or produces average 60-day returns no higher than the full-sample average in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts under very low policy rates signals credit-sensitive demand recovery and future construction-linked income growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 6-month moving average while FEDFUNDS is below 0.50%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not outperform untriggered observations over 60 trading days, or if the conditional return spread is negative in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI with the federal funds rate still near zero signals a negative inflation-policy gap that pressures margins and raises future tightening expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 3-month CPIAUCSL growth crosses above its prior 12-month average while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.50%
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered condition is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if its average return is not below baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A positive short-term payroll trend signals improving income growth and reduced recession risk, creating a risk-on repricing that produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 1-month PAYEMS changes fail to predict higher 5-day returns than negative PAYEMS changes in walk-forward tests, or if the 5-day directional hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real GDP relative to its trailing trend signals broad demand weakness and downward earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 crosses below its 4-quarter moving average or posts two consecutive quarterly declines
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 contraction triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if triggered returns are not lower than untriggered returns in walk-forward tests.
